title: 5 Stocks to Watch From the Prospering Insurance Brokerage Industry
text: Increased demand for insurance products, given an aging population, baby boomers and millennials, and the adoption of technology should drive insurance brokers like MMC, AON, BRO, ERIE and RYAN.

text: Brown & Brown (BRO) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Brown & Brown (BRO) to Expand UK Presence With Buyout
text: Brown & Brown's (BRO) pending Kentro Capital Limited acquisition will help it boost presence London.

title: Why Brown & Brown Stock Jumped 12% in April
text: Brown & Brown saw revenue increase 23% year over year in the first quarter. It also closed on the acquisition of a Canadian insurance broker.
